How It Works

Here's how our premier fragrance subscription works

Choose Your Monthly Plan

Get 1 or 2 fragrances per month, starting at $9.72 for the 1st month.

Add Scents To Your Fragrance Calendar

Enjoy Awesome New Fragrances Every Month

Expand your fragrance collection at a fraction of the cost.

TRY SCENTBOX NOW

What Can I Expect

  • 30-Day Supply of authentic designer fragrance (0.27 oz / 8 ml, 4 sprays a day for 30 days)
  • Over 1000 designer fragrances, including premium high-end designers
  • Full atomizer case EACH month, lots of fun colors
